feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to restrict CDS view through PFCG role without field restrictions ?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts.

I'm implementing one CDS view that should be viewed by all users who have a specific PFCG role .

I tried to implement it through access controls [  grant select on
MY_CDS_VIEW
where aspect pfcg_auth ...]

but this way my authorization object has to have a field mapped to my view to filter data based on that .. but in my case all users with that role will have full access on the cds data . how to Implement that ?

entry.title: Expose Fiori Launchpad to public internet only specific for certain users
entry.content: We wanted to expose Fiori Launchpad to public internet only specific for certain users. Please advise possibilities.

entry.title: BUSINESS PLACE IN SD DOCUMENT
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are currently using for regulatory purposes the business place for India company code. We need to be able to have the business place on billing document in sap public cloud, we have updated the mapping "Assign Business Places to Sales Offices". However, the business place is not being picked up on our line item. 

Cany anyone please guide me on how we can put the business place on billing document for India.

Thank you

entry.title: Unable to load tutorial https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-application-cap-e2e.html
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to access below tutorial:

https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-application-cap-e2e.html

On click of the tutorial to expand it, Its not loading at all.

I could see few errors in the browser console:


I tried using different browsers, signed in, and signed out, but it's not helping.

Can someone suggest how to access this tutorial?

Thanks
Vivek Rawat

entry.title: App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded. Failed
entry.content: 标题：错误消息：无法打开应用程序，因为无法加载应用程序的 SAP UI5 组件。details： { “info”： “无法加载导航意图的 UI5 组件 \”#fguidemo-display\“”， “technicalMessage”： “无法解决 'fg/uidemo/controller/App.controller.js' 的依赖关系 -> 'sap/ui/core/Messaging.js'： 无法Messaging.js从 ../resources/sap/ui/core/Messaging.js：脚本加载错误 模块错误：无法解析“fg/uidemo/controller/App.controller.js”的依赖关系 ->“sap/ui/core/Messaging.js”：无法从 .. 加载“sap/ui/core/Messaging.js”。/resources/sap/ui/core/Messaging.js：脚本加载错误 在 p1 （https://port8080-workspaces-ws-t6g8w.jp20.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/resources/sap-ui-core.js:53:213） 在 j1.failWith （https://port8080-workspaces-ws-t6g8w.jp20.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/resources/sap-ui-core.js:40:43） 在 https://port8080-workspaces-ws-t6g8w.jp20.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/resources/sap-ui-core.js:65:1556\n原因：模块错误：无法从 .. 加载“sap/ui/core/Messaging.js”。/resources/sap/ui/core/Messaging.js：脚本加载错误 在 p1 （https://port8080-workspaces-ws-t6g8w.jp20.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/resources/sap-ui-core.js:53:213） 在 j1.failWith （https://port8080-workspaces-ws-t6g8w.jp20.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/resources/sap-ui-core.js:40:43） 在 HTMLScriptElement.p （https://port8080-workspaces-ws-t6g8w.jp20.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/resources/sap-ui-core.js:60:468）中 原因：错误：脚本加载错误 HTMLScriptElement.p （https://port8080-workspaces-ws-t6g8w.jp20.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/resources/sap-ui-core.js:60:510）“}

entry.title: How to update custom workflow scenario id in standard Fiori apps manifest file?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently, a standard Fiori app Credit Memo Request is having hardcoded scenario id in its manifest file in below path:

embeddedcomponents>workflowcomponents>settings>scenarioid

How to update the custom workflow scenarioid in standard apps manifest?

Current Approach,

I have extended app using Adaptation Project and created new section for Approval Details. I have used component usage : sap.io.bpm.sworkfloweditor.lib.reuse.stworkflowinstance. With this I am able to show table but its not showing any data. Also, I have checked in network tab, its not sending any requests.

entry.title: Migrate extended app from WEBIDE to BAS
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have "My timesheet" ( ZHCMFAB_MY_TIME) app, which is extended in WEBIDE in BTP NEO environment. We need to migrate this app from WEBIDE to BAS. 

1) Is it possible to migrate an extended Fiori app from WEBIDE to BAS?
2) If yes, can we use migration option given by BAS tool? will it change any files and how do we revert incase of any issues? Any best practice available?

Appreciate if you could help with above questions

Thanks,

Swarnaprakash

entry.title: SAP CAP & UI5 / Fiori Elements - State message handling recommendations / approach
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm looking for a solution to handle state messages in SAP CAP, combined with SAP Fiori Elements.

According to the UI5 documentation, state messages should be part of the response payload. https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/fbe1cb5613cf4a40a841750bf813238e.html#loiofbe1cb5613cf4a40a841750bf813238e/section_LMFSM

I'm in the situation where I have a business object modelled in CAP, which can contain multiple errors (background processing / jobs) where a user will finally need to make some manual changes to the object. Basically, clear case of state messages (messages don't change as long as the object doesn't change).

Currently it seems like CAP only supports transition messages out of the box with e.g. req.info, req.error...

I'd like to get to a situation where these messages are captured in the backend and provided as state messages to the frontend, so that when a user opens the object in change mode, the state messages are properly shown.

I couldn't find an example of this scenario and the CAP documentation doesn't seem to mention an approach  / recommendation for this scenario. 

Any pointers in the right direction are greatly appreciated!

Cheers,

Geert-Jan

entry.title: HOW to create a custom LOGIN page in CAPM in sap BTP
entry.content:
Hello experts 

I am working on SAP BTP .  have created a full stack project  By using combinations of technologies such as CAPM(cloud application programming model), CDS(core data services),node JS ,FIORI ui5,additionaly  added authentication using xsuaa which secures my odata services   then deployed it over cloudfoundry  and it is working correctly.

i followed this tutorial    :     

Set Up Trust Between SAP Cloud Identity Services and SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment | SAP Tutorials 

and setup trust between cloud identity services and sap BTP ,cloudfoundry  environment . I understands this provides Authentication and single sign-on for users in the cloud.  

 

 After clicking on URL(Which is in my cloud foundry space) it redirects me to a Login page which is default login page of Idp(identity providers)  and after authenticating users ,xsuaa server and approuter exchanges token and then approuter, routes   on my  application welcome page (or any xml view in fiori ui5 which i have used for welcome page) .                                                                                                                                            This is the default login page of Idp  which i have faced:

Is it is possible that i can create my own custom login page instead of using default login page of Idp by keeping the functionality of approuter, and xsuaa server as same .

i explored sap community and got some usefull tutorials and resources which helps me in understanding the flow of login and working of browser, approuter, xsuaa server, idp  .                                                                      These resources are here:

  Guide for User Authentication and Authorization in... - SAP Community

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-application-router/ba-p/13393550

Could you please guide me on How to create custom login page for login by keeping the functionality of approuter and xsuaa server as same  .

Any recommendations, tutorial, or resources  specific to SAP BTP  would be greatly appreciated.

@gregorw

@thomas_jung 

@MSo 

 @AlexPJ  @RobertWaywell 

 @MioYasutake

 @qmacro

@gregorw

@Animatron56

@martinstenzig 

@Dinu 

@Bibhu 

@eshrinivasan 

@Dan_Wroblewski 

@David_Chaviano 

@acancelado 

@Senqi_Hu 

@DominikTylczyn

entry.title: sap fiori elemets application for the list report page
entry.content:
Hi All

Using Fiori elements list report page can we use the northwind OData service for demo use case instead of custom CDS views.

1. If Yes can we add more than one custom filter using guided development and where we can write the custom code to the filters.

i had tried using northwind OData service multiple filters are not possible with in the same entity by using the different entity set using guided development i am getting the error that

The existing controller file contents doesn't match the supported template. Copy and replace the function manually.  how to resolve it.

entry.title: Warehouse Transfer - issues to involve CO09 and BOP
entry.content:
We need to automate our warehouse sourcing process through the inter-warehouse transfer process. Today we have many problems that I can list below: -> Need for the supply team to supply the products that need to be transferred through a spreadsheet with item, origin deposit, destination deposit and quantity;-> Need for the storage team to make the transfer before the BOP reservation process;-> Origin deposit has a negative balance in the need because it ends up transferring stock that is reserved in Delivery;-> The whole process is very manual and requires a certain amount of headcounts to do; In order to implement a more agile process and without the human need to carry out such activities, I would like to know if SAP provides any transaction that allows us to execute a transfer between warehouses in a massive and scheduled way to execute daily supplies.

 

The idea is that I say to a certain warehouse example LV01 that the one in the XXX Center, Material: ABCD needs to have at least 3000 CXs and at most 5000 CXs and that it will be supplied by the deposit "ZZ01", that is, when the stock drops from 3000 CXs it will automatically transfer 2000 CXs withdrawing from LA01, however, he can only transfer the available quantity, that is, the quantity that is left over in ZZ01 where (Stock - Reserve = Available). Is there this standard process or just a customized one? Or something similar?

entry.title: How to add Document Type (BLART) in Supplier Invoices List Version 2 (F1060a) Fiori app
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to add new field "Document Type" both in the selection input field and in the report output to the Supplier Invoices List (Version 2) report app?

In the Adapt filters and in the settings, I cannot see the Document Type field but the business requirement is to add/bring the Document type as like other fields (For ex: Company code / Invoice No., / Reference).

Please help me with the steps how to add it into the standard app F1060A.

Thanks for letting me know.

Kind regards.

entry.title: Can we use fiori app for master data upload
entry.content: Pls explain

entry.title: In sap S4 Hana, not able to upload form template. Getting error form must not be changed in this sys
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I'm not able to upload form template after my changes in S4 Hana system. My form template starts with prefix 'ZF_*' instead of 'ZZ1_*'. I'm able to upload the form templates with ZZ1_* by successfully assigning it to package and transports using ‘Register Extensions for Transport’ app. But the form templates starting with 'ZF_*', I'm not able to change and not able to see in this app to reassign it to package. When I'm try to upload the form template getting error 'Form Template could not be updated' and Item ID 'ZF_*' must not be changed in this system. Could you please help me to figure out this issue.

 Thanks,

Mythili

entry.title: FIORI APF using APF configuration modeling, how to create tIle for it
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have created a FIORI APF (Analysis Path Framework) using APF configuration modeling and I am in need of guidance on how to create a Fiori tile for it so that users can easily execute it. This is my first time working with APF. I am able to execute it from APF configuration modeling and it is working fine, but I am unsure how to make it visible to the user.

entry.title: Unexpected OData Service Request with Incorrect Path After Deploying AppRouter
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have deployed a full-stack project on SAP BTP using Cloud Foundry, and everything is working fine with my AppRouter. After deployment, I received the following URL for my AppRouter:

When I access this URL, it correctly redirects me to the welcome file (as specified in my AppRouter configuration), and my application (a SAP UI5 project) runs as expected. However, when inspecting the network traffic in the browser's console, I noticed that the app is attempting to fetch the following URL even though I haven't requested data from this service yet:

 

 

https://245509888trial-demo-fulldeploy.cfapps.us10000001.hana.ondemand.com/project125/odata/v4/library/

   project125 is the name of my UI5 application folder, which is inside the welcome file path in the                      AppRouter.

   library: is the base path for one of my OData services.

 

The issue is that this URL is returning a 404 status because the app seems to be appending the UI5 application path (project125) to the OData service URL (/odata/v4/library/), resulting in an incorrect URL: .../project125/odata/v4/library/.

My Questions are:

  1. Why is my AppRouter or UI5 app automatically appending the project125 path to the OData service URL when I haven't made any request to that service yet?
  2. How can I prevent the UI5 app from appending the project125 path to the service URL so that it fetches the correct path for the OData service?

 

 

this is my xs-app.json file  of my ui   project125.
 
 
{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/test-resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "none"
    }
  ]
}
 
 
 
 
THis is my approuter     xs-app.json file  :
 
{
"authenticationMethod": "route",
"logout": {
    "logoutEndpoint": "/app-logout",
    "logoutPage": "/"
},
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/app/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "localDir": ".",
      "cacheControl": "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/user-api(.*)",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "sap-approuter-userapi"
  },
    {
      "source": "^/appconfig/",
      "localDir": ".",
      "cacheControl": "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "destination": "srv-api",
      "csrfProtection": true,
      "authenticationType": "none"
    }
  ],
  "welcomeFile": "/project125"
}
 
Any solutions  or suggestions on how to resolve this would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: How to test ABAP RAP V4 service custom/instance Actions using Postman or SAP Gateway
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Please help me point to location or documentations to test custom Actions created in ABAP RAP V4 Service.

Thanks-

entry.title: To attach SAPUI5's MVC method to Fiori Element page in CAP model for more flexible screens
entry.content:
Dear,

I hope this message finds you well.

I have developed a screen using the Fiori app generator within an IDE. The service was defined using Fiori Elements, and I can view the CDS-based table via localhost using CDS watch. The entity types are defined in the db\data\schema.cds file.

I would like to customize this screen more freely. Rather than modifying the table with the "Show Page Map," I aim to enhance the Fiori screen with additional design elements and functions to create a more versatile application. While I am familiar with the UI5 MVC development approach (using view.xml and controller.js), I am unsure if I can mix Fiori Elements with the UI5 MVC method. Specifically, I am wondering if modifying the manifest.json would allow me to achieve this.

I want to add a dialog and further functions into the localhost page created with cds.

If you have any experience or relevant knowledge regarding this integration, I would greatly appreciate your guidance. Additionally, if you could provide examples or any documentation to assist me, that would be very helpful.

Thank you in advance for your time and assistance.

Best regards,
Wonpyo

 

#sapui5 #CAP #CDS #fiori element

entry.title: Fiori : Navigate from List to Detail Alternative
entry.content:
Hi Community members,

I have received a requirement from my customer where they would like to restrict/disable the click action for navigation to detail page anywhere in the row area and instead click on the chevron icon at the end of the row highlighted. Reason for such request could be because we also have an edit option where during the editing values, by mistake when the click happens, the detail page opens during editing.

Has anyone come across such requirement. Your response is appreciated. Thanks

SAPUI5 SAP Fiori @maheshpalavalli @GregMalewski

entry.title: How to develop Fiori List Report based on CDS View without Web IDE
entry.content:
Hi experts!

Currently I’m working on creating Fiori app that displays list report based on CDS View developed on Eclipse.

Since I don’t have a license to use Web IDE (SAP business application studio), I need to develop that Fiori app without web IDE.

So the question is whether it is possible or not to develop that Fiori app only by using eclipse?

And how can you do it?

 

I appreciate if you could answer my question.

Thank you so much in advance.
